faq1.q: Can the source code be freely modified after delivery?
faq1.a: Yes, the delivered code is complete compilable source code, you can freely modify and secondary develop according to business needs, without any restrictions.

faq2.q: What technical background is needed for deployment?
faq2.a: Need to be familiar with Java backend development and Vue frontend development. We provide complete deployment documentation and technical support.

faq3.a: Fully supported. You can deploy on your own servers, Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud or any environment, with fully self-controlled data.

faq4.q: How to get technical support after purchase?
faq4.a: We provide 6 months of free technical support, including deployment guidance, question answering, bug fix and other services.

faq5.q: Does it include database design documentation?
faq5.a: Includes complete database design documentation, API interface documentation, system architecture diagrams and other full technical documentation.

faq6.q: Can it be used for commercial projects?
faq6.a: Yes. After purchasing commercial license, you can use it for your own commercial projects without paying additional fees.
